meaning: достичь высокого положения несмотря на системные барьеры
example: The team celebrated women who broke the glass ceiling in tech.

meaning: приложить дополнительные усилия ради отличного результата
example: She went the extra mile to mentor young colleagues.

meaning: вдохновлять действиями, а не только словами
example: Great managers lead by example every day.
He stood his ground during the fairness discussion.
On March 8, everyone was invited to speak their mind.
The volunteers rose to the occasion during the event.

meaning: начать активно и эффективно с первых минут
example: The new project team hit the ground running.
Small policy changes can move the needle on equality.
Each speaker brought unique insights to the table.
hint: что ты кладёшь в общий проект

example: Many men stepped up to support the celebration team.

meaning: встать на чью-то сторону и помочь
example: Colleagues backed her up during the presentation.
A good team always has your back.
hint: ты не один в этой задаче

example: She held her own in a tough negotiation.
The campaign worked because the team thought outside the box.
Her research set the bar high for the whole department.
Mentorship programs open doors for students.
Every volunteer can make a difference.
He took the lead in organizing gifts for teachers.
Her clear ideas won everyone over.
The forum helped build bridges across teams.
By the end, all departments were on the same page.
hint: читать одну и ту же страницу

example: Women scientists were in the spotlight this week.
In this project, the local team calls the shots.

meaning: не терять прогресс и продолжать движение
example: After March 8, keep the momentum going with regular meetups.
Open feedback turned the tide in team culture.

meaning: создать что-то полностью с самого начала
example: They built the mentorship platform from the ground up.

meaning: помогать другим в ответ на полученную помощь
example: She was inspired to pay it forward after graduation.
The startup keeps pushing the envelope in education.
Leaders should walk the talk on inclusion.
hint: не только говорить, но и делать

example: Simple words can lift someone up before a big talk.
